message:
fix: improve short truncation to show actual content

When maxLen <= 3, return first maxLen characters (respecting UTF-8
boundaries) instead of truncated ellipsis. Users see actual content
rather than just "..." or ".." or ".".

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
